tagline: Ride the Sky. Feel the Rush.

design_system.elevation: Color-tinted glowing shadows (rgba) + dark section glow halos

sections.label: Hero
sections.design: Full-viewport photo background (hero.jpg) with left-gradient overlay, left-aligned editorial layout
features: Photo background with 90%→5% left-to-right navy overlay
Left-aligned hero with Kaushan Script accent line
Animated horizontal marquee strip (infinite scroll, 28s loop)
Streak-fly keyframe animation on marquee items
Floating badge (Rides Open Today) with pulse glow
Vertical side-rail with staggered fade-in text

sections.label: Ride the Thunder
sections.design: Dark navy section — cinematic spotlight card for Skybreaker + 4-col dark-glass mini-cards

rides.name: Skybreaker
rides.layout: Full-width spotlight with photo, 4 live stats, CTA

sections.label: Navigate the Park
sections.design: Dark navy bento grid — 3×2 zone cards, Neon Midway spans 2 cols

sections.label: Get Your Tickets
sections.design: Dark navy + diagonal stripe texture, ticket-stub aesthetic with CSS perforated dividers and punch-hole semicircles

tiers.name: Unlimited Ride Wristband
tiers.layout: Full-width orange gradient spotlight with perforated right panel

tiers.name: General Admission
tiers.layout: Horizontal boarding-pass card with perforated divider

tiers.name: Fast Pass Add-on
tiers.layout: Horizontal boarding-pass card with perforated divider

tiers.name: Family Pack (4)
tiers.layout: Horizontal boarding-pass card with perforated divider

sections.label: Feast in the Gardens
sections.design: Dark near-black warm background, amber glow halo, bento grid — Thunder Burgers spans 2 cols, Refreshment Bars spans 3

sections.label: Stay for the Show
sections.design: Deep near-black starfield (14-layer CSS radial gradient stars), spotlight + 2 mini event cards

items.name: Skylark Night Spectacle
items.layout: Full-width spotlight, pulsing live dot, 3 schedule stats, 🌟 with blue glow filter

sections.label: Life at Skylark
sections.design: Dark navy, dual infinite-scroll horizontal tracks (left + right directions), hover pauses both tracks

sections.label: Got Questions?
sections.design: Dark navy, 2-column layout — sticky decorative sidebar left, numbered editorial accordion right
sections.interaction: JS accordion: max-height expansion 0.4s ease, sky-blue left-border accent on open state, numbered rows 01–06

animations.hero_marquee: CSS translateX infinite scroll, 28s linear, streak-fly keyframe on items
animations.nav: Background + shadow transition on scroll past 60px
animations.gallery_tracks: dual CSS translateX infinite, 32s + 28s linear, pauses on hover

accessibility.color_contrast: White text on dark navy sections — WCAG AA compliant

seo.title: Skylark Adventure Park — Ride the Sky
seo.meta_description: A high-energy amusement park packed with thrilling rides, classic games, and sky-high fun.

key_phrases_used: Ride the Sky. Feel the Rush.
Ride all day, every ride, zero limits

redesign_log.change: Full photo background, editorial left-aligned layout, marquee strip, streak animations
Replaced 3-col grid with dual infinite-scroll horizontal tracks on dark navy
Replaced SVG bubble map + list with bento grid of 5 full-color zone cards
Replaced auto-fill white card grid with dark navy spotlight + 4 dark-glass mini-cards
Replaced standard pricing cards with ticket-stub boarding-pass layout, perforated dividers
Replaced light card grid with dark warm bento grid, varied column spans
Replaced light card grid with deep starfield, night spectacle spotlight + 2 mini event cards
Replaced centered white-card accordion with dark 2-col layout, numbered editorial accordion
